zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine De Sinclair於1109年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，她的父親Henry Sinclair35歲，母親Rosabel Strathearn19歲。她和Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar至少有1個兒子。她去世於1171年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年62歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine De Sinclair于1109年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，她的父亲Henry Sinclair35岁，母亲Rosabel Strathearn19岁。她和Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar至少有1个儿子。她去世于1171年在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年62岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine De Sinclair was born in 1109, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Henry Sinclair, was 35 and her mother, Rosabel Strathearn, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. She died in 1171, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine De Sinclair est née en 1109, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Rosabel Strathearn, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Elle est décédée en 1171, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine De Sinclair 1109 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 35 und ihre Mutter Rosabel Strathearn 19. Sie hatte mit Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1171 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine De Sinclair è nata il nel 1109 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Sinclair, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Rosabel Strathearn, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Morì nel 1171, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルス
ja.Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland: スコットランドミドロスアンロスリン
ja.Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie,: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウン
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine De Sinclairが1109年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclairは35歳，母Rosabel Strathearnは19歳であった。彼女はHugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templarとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1171年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで62歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine De Sinclair(이)가 1109년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosabel Strathearn(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1171년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine De Sinclair nasceu em 1109, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Rosabel Strathearn, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Ela faleceu em 1171, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine De Sinclair родилась в 1109 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosabel Strathearn, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Она умерла в 1171 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine De Sinclair nació en 1109, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Henry Sinclair, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Rosabel Strathearn, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Murió en 1171, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
